# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-sa
  namespace: default
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
    component: data-pipeline
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
        component: data-pipeline
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: batch-processing-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: data-processor:1.2.0
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10000
            runAsGroup: 10000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: data-volume
              mountPath: /data
          env:
            - name: PROCESSING_MODE
              value: "batch"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "pgrep -f data-processor"
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 60
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "test -f /tmp/ready"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 256Mi
        - name: data-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 2Gi
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
